generated_oml:
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor for environmental monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]
instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor for environmental monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]
instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light level sensor for environmental monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor for environmental monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]
instance EnergyUsageSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy usage sensor from Building Control Systems",
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyUsageDataTransmitted
]
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]
instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]
instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]
instance EnergyUsageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyUsageSensor
]
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature sensor data from Building Control Systems",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]
instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity sensor data from Building Control Systems",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]
instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light level sensor data from Building Control Systems",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]
instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy sensor data from Building Control Systems",
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]
instance EnergyUsageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time energy usage data from Building Control Systems",
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyUsageDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with device metadata and runtime data",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelingTools, ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework
]
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for MQTT-based sensor data ingestion",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, PredictiveAnalytics
]
instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and synchronization",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, PredictiveAnalytics
]
instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for 3D visualization and simulation",
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualization
]
instance BIMModelingTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tools for creating and enriching models",
    DTDFVocab:enables Simulation, ThreeDVisualization
]
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering frameworks for automated transformation and deployment",
    DTDFVocab:enables Simulation, ThreeDVisualization
]
instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations",
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight
]
instance Simulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building simulation for operational analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]
instance PredictiveAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization and health effects",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, HealthEffectsInsight
]
instance EnergyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization service for building operations",
    DTDFVocab:provides HVACControlCommand
]
instance VisualComfortAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for adjusting visual comfort via lighting control",
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingControlCommand
]
instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]
instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational status insights for facility management"
]
instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation-based insights for building performance analysis"
]
instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for energy consumption optimization"
]
instance HealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights related to occupant health effects from environmental conditions"
]
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visual representation of building data"
]
instance HVACControlCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to adjust HVAC systems for energy efficiency",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance LightingControlCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to adjust lighting for visual comfort",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC control actuator within Building Control Systems (BCS)"
]
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system actuator within Building Control Systems (BCS)"
]
instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building environment for the Living Lab case study",
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, LightSensor, OccupancySensor, EnergyUsageSensor, HVACActuator, LightingActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals (e.g., HVAC setpoints, lighting commands) sent via Eclipse Hono and Ditto to physical actuators in Building Control Systems (BCS)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Sub-second to second-level synchronization for sensor data and control signals; simulation and optimization processes operating at varying time scales (e.g., minutes for energy optimization, real-time for monitoring)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated modular services including BIM-based models, Eclipse Hono/Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine visualization, and standardized extension points for service integration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Entire building life cycle including design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, with the DT primarily focused on operational phase monitoring and optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validated using Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to ensure interoperability and architectural soundness; real-time synchronization minimizes semantic drift."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono (MQTT-based IoT messaging) and Ditto (digital twin protocol) for bidirectional communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Cloud-based or containerized deployment using Eclipse Hono and Ditto; specific infrastructure details not provided."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems via standardized interfaces (e.g., BIM, IoT protocols), though specific systems not detailed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards (IFC), Eclipse Hono/Ditto protocols, and ODTE metric for interoperability; adherence to AECO-specific standards."
]
